news.headline: 9 killed in armed attack at mining site in Balochistan’s Chagai
news.summary:
<p>QUETTA: At least nine people working at a copper and gold project site in Balochistan’s Chagai district were killed in an armed attack by unidentified assailants, according to officials.</p>
